PowerShell($env:Path = "C:\\Users\\hzq\\.conda\\envs\\ACC\\Library\\bin;C:\\Users\\hzq\\.conda\\envs\\ACC;" + $env:Path; try { Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $img = [System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\("C:\\Users\\hzq\\Desktop\\overlay\\config\\logo.jpg"\); $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($img, 256, 256\); $icon = [System.Drawing.Icon]::FromHandle\($bmp.GetHicon\(\)\); $fs = [System.IO.File]::Create\("C:\\Users\\hzq\\Desktop\\overlay\\config\\logo.ico"\); $icon.Save\($fs\); $fs.Close\(\); $icon.Dispose\(\); $bmp.Dispose\(\); $img.Dispose\(\); Write-Output "ico created successfully" } catch { Write-Output "Error: $_" })
PowerShell(python -c "import struct; f=open\('config/logo.ico','rb'\); h=f.read\(6\); print\('Header:', h.hex\(\)\); f.seek\(0\); print\('File size:', len\(f.read\(\)\), 'bytes'\)")

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $path = \(Resolve-Path "config/logo.ico"\).Path; $ico = New-Object System.Drawing.Icon $path; Write-Host "=== Icon Info ==="; $ico.Size; $ico.Dispose\(\); Write-Host "=== Individual Frames ==="; $stream = [System.IO.File]::OpenRead\($path\); $reader = [System.IO.BinaryReader]::new\($stream\); $null = $reader.ReadUInt16\(\); $null = $reader.ReadUInt16\(\); $count = $reader.ReadUInt16\(\); Write-Host "Frame count: $count"; for \($i = 0; $i -lt $count; $i++\) { $w = $reader.ReadByte\(\); $h = $reader.ReadByte\(\); $colors = $reader.ReadByte\(\); $null = $reader.ReadByte\(\); $planes = $reader.ReadUInt16\(\); $bpp = $reader.ReadUInt16\(\); if \($w -eq 0\) { $w = 256 }; if \($h -eq 0\) { $h = 256 }; Write-Host "  Frame $i`: ${w}x${h}, ${bpp}bpp, ${colors} colors in palette" }; $reader.Dispose\(\); $stream.Dispose\(\))
